intro: Vilfa squarrosa, also known as Milium squarrosum, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the family Poaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, offering relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help soothe digestive issues and protect against cell damage. The bioactive constituents of Vilfa squarrosa include flavonoids, saponins, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Vilfa squarrosa is commonly used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being incorporated into herbal salves and tinctures to support respiratory and digestive health.
